title: Roasted Onions(and more)
description: This mod adds delicious (mostly) Danish cuisine into the game
body:
Roasted Onions

About

"Roasted Onions" is a Minecraft mod that adds new food (mostly Danish cuisine). "Roasted Onions" supports Danish, German, American English, Upside Down English, Pirate Speak, Anglish, Low German,Lolcat, Polish and Ukranian.

Dependencies

- This mod requires to use Farmers Delight version 1.2 or above for roasted onions, Hotdogs and Hotdogs with Ketchup.
- It needs Oh The Biomes You'll Go 1.4 or above for blue Spandauers. The mod would boot without Oh The Biomes You'll Go.
